case_title: HERBERT BARASCH VS. CONSTANTIN BUICIUC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARASCH, HERBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUICIUC, CONSTANTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 559 VALENCIA STREET, #79, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARASCH, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BUICIUC, CONSTANTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
